scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "APP_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5173 ./.venv/bin/uvicorn backend.app.main:app --reload --reload-dir backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:open: concurrently -n api,web,browser -c blue,green,magenta "APP_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5173 ./.venv/bin/uvicorn backend.app.main:app --reload --reload-dir backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "sh -c 'sleep 2 && ./bin/open-url http://127.0.0.1:5173'"
scripts.prod:open: npm run build && npm run start:open
